headline.text: L2 ML3 depositor pulled at *10:31* for recurring piston faults after seized rotary slider — still down at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 cleared routine cleaning flags on S2 and S3, then hit a tree nut residue find in the T3 washing equipment at 08:32 that triggered a level 4 re-clean still in progress at window close. S2 ultrasonic blade faulted at 10:13, maintenance reset by 10:29 and line is running. S4 continued commissioning tests with German techs on-site.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 ran cookies on white chocolate paste with no issues. ML3 completed a full oil flush by 07:09, pushed chocolate, then hit a seized rotary slider A at 08:45. Maintenance helped remove it, sliders washed and reinstalled by 10:00, but piston faults returned at 10:10. Depositor pulled for full wash at 10:31 and still down at window close.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 worked through an almond changeover with multiple setbacks: brass fitting fell in buffer tank at 12:15 (found intact at 13:34), frozen pipe at 19:17 (cleared by 19:35), belt damaged heater at 23:03 (heater survived), and at window close the depositor water pipe is bent, buffer tank won't drain under pressure, and two nozzle plate parts are missing. ML4 cleared a PTL2 melter reset at 03:58 and a mold jam at 05:31, running through window close aside from a feed door latch issue flagged at 01:57.

resolved.title: S2 ultrasonic blade faulted, caramel sticking
resolved.summary: Ultrasonic blades faulted while processing caramel at the cutter; maintenance performed hard reset and line returned to operation.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance reset blades at 10:23, line running by 10:29 — "Line is running" (Katya Farnsworth).

resolved.title: Brass fitting fell into ML1 buffer tank
resolved.summary: Brass cap from pump sprayer fell into buffer tank during wall cleaning; crew used mesh screens over buckets to search.
resolved.resolution: Found intact at 13:34 — "The missing brass fitting was found intact" (Grey Boscan).

resolved.title: ML1 pipe frozen during oil flush
resolved.summary: Pipe froze at 19:17 during flushing process; maintenance worked to unclog using heat.
resolved.resolution: Unclogged by 19:35 — "finally got it unclogged...draining from the bottom" (Nathan Gevenois).

resolved.title: ML4 PTL2 not melting chocolate
resolved.summary: PTL2 melter stopped heating at 03:34; maintenance called to investigate program fault.
resolved.resolution: Program reset at 03:58 — "Maintenance reset the program- melter is back on" (Alan Greer).

resolved.title: MF Matrix checkweigher rejecting underweight
resolved.summary: Checkweigher minimum weight set 10 grams higher than spec required, rejecting all underweight pieces.
resolved.resolution: Leader adjusted checkweigher by 08:52 to match spec — "this has effectively resolved the issue" (David Zuniaga).

resolved.title: ML4 mold jam at depositor
resolved.summary: Mold jammed at 04:07 during deposit operation, line stopped to clear.
resolved.resolution: Cleared by 05:31 — "Jam cleared, continuing to deposit" (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: ML4 down for TG gondola inspection
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 07:06 for Preston to check something in the gondola.

resolved.title: ML1 rice hose installed instead of almond hose
resolved.summary: During changeover, rice product hose was found installed when almond hose should have been in place.
resolved.resolution: Switched at 08:50 — "The hose has already been switched from rice to almonds" (Imperial).

needs_attention.title: S2 tree nut scrap found in T3 washing equipment
needs_attention.summary: QA found tree nut residue accumulation in Tunnel 3 washing machine during post-clean inspection; level 4 re-clean in progress with ATP and allergen testing.
needs_attention.status: Level 4 cleaning in progress as of 09:10, line not running, ATP and allergen tests pending.

needs_attention.title: ML3 depositor pulled for recurring piston faults
needs_attention.summary: Rotary slider A seized at 08:45, was washed and reinstalled by 10:00, but piston faults returned at 10:10 when trying to purge chocolate. Depositor pulled for complete wash.
needs_attention.status: Depositor pulled and being washed as of 10:31, line down at window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 depositor water pipe bent and damaged
needs_attention.summary: Depositor water pipe found bent with damage during changeover; maintenance called to assess and repair.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance called at 07:47, pipe confirmed "a lot damaged" per Preston at 08:05, heater survived but no repair ETA.

needs_attention.title: ML1 buffer tank oil not draining under pressure
needs_attention.summary: While draining buffer tank during flush at 10:26, oil is not coming out under pressure as expected.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working on pressure issue as of 10:26, still unresolved at window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 two nozzle plate parts missing
needs_attention.summary: While installing nozzle plate at 10:31, operator realized two parts are missing — the pieces that hold the blades in place.
needs_attention.status: Parts missing as of 10:31, names unknown, searching for parts at window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 TG4 entryway feed door latch broken
needs_attention.summary: TG4 entryway feed door near metal detector won't close; latch may be broken and door appears bent.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance aware of issue as of 04:23, door still won't close at window close.
